description_long: This object consists of a group of various traffic signs, each mounted on a slender metallic post. The signs display a range of regulatory, warning, and informational symbols, including circular blue and red signs, a parking sign, a stop sign, and a yield sign. The signs are arranged in rows, with the majority being circular and a few being octagonal or triangular. The faces of the signs are brightly colored, featuring high-contrast symbols and borders for visibility. The posts are metallic gray and appear to be made of steel, providing sturdy support for the signs. The collection is typical of what might be found at an intersection, parking area, or along urban streets.
description: A group of urban traffic signs on metal posts, featuring various regulatory, warning, and informational symbols in blue, red, and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all traffic signs, with clear visibility of their symbols and colors.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profiles of the signs and the alignment of the posts.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the signs and the uniformity of the posts.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view highlighting the arrangement and spacing of the signs in rows.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: Various traffic symbols including no entry, parking, pedestrian, and yield icons.
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, intersection, parking lot entrance
